app.securePlatform: Secure operations platform for projects, cash, teams, and profitability.

notifications.pushEnabled: Push notifications enabled on this device.
notifications.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported on this browser.
notifications.pushNotConfigured: Push is not configured on the server yet.

advanceSubmitted.title: New advance request
advanceSubmitted.message: An advance request is waiting for review.

purchaseSubmitted.title: New work purchase
purchaseSubmitted.message: A work purchase is waiting for verification.

expenseSubmitted.title: New expense
expenseSubmitted.message: An expense is waiting for verification.

missingReceipt.title: Missing receipt
missingReceipt.message: A submitted item does not include a receipt.

supplierOverdue.title: Supplier overdue
supplierOverdue.message: A supplier invoice is overdue and needs action.

taxOverdue.title: Tax overdue
taxOverdue.message: A tax obligation is overdue and needs action.

vehicleDue.title: Vehicle maintenance due
vehicleDue.message: A fleet maintenance deadline needs attention.

lowStock.title: Warehouse low stock
lowStock.message: An inventory item is at or below its low-stock threshold.

missionDelayed.title: Mission delayed
missionDelayed.message: A mission is delayed and needs review.

empty.noMissionAssigned: No mission is assigned to this account yet.
empty.noApprovedPurchases: No approved purchases yet. Categories will appear here after purchases are approved.

messages.signedInAs: Signed in as {{email}}. The technician app is limited to assigned missions only.
messages.reviewReceipt: Review detected price and product before submitting.
messages.cameraRequired: Camera access is required to take a receipt photo.
messages.receiptCaptured: {{count}} receipt photo captured. Cost is mandatory for each receipt. Note is optional.
messages.receiptsCaptured: {{count}} receipt photos captured. Cost is mandatory for each receipt. Note is optional.

login.remember: Keep me signed in on this device

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Live control center for cash, approvals, project cost, and risk.
dashboard.purchaseCategoryDescription: Approved purchase spend by category, ranked highest first.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Contract value, allocated budget, committed cost, actual cost, and remaining budget are tracked here.
projects.noDocuments: No documents or receipts uploaded yet
projects.newDescription: Project costs are affected only by approved spending and automatic deployment allowances.
projects.costRuleDescription: Pending and rejected submissions are excluded from project cost. Deployment allowance is automatic and receipt-free. Food, hotel, and personal spending belong inside allowance unless an admin override is recorded.

missions.title: Missions
missions.description: Missions lock the team list to prevent ghost workers. End date can stay empty until the mission is completed.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Create operational teams. Mission creation snapshots the team into a locked worker list.

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Salary and deployment allowance rate are maintained per employee.

technician.title: Technician App
technician.description: Limited field access for assigned missions, vehicle assignment, receipt capture, and advance payment demands.

approvals.advanceDescription: Advance requests pass project budget and company cash checks. Super Admin can override blocked cases.
approvals.expenseDescription: Pending expenses never affect project cost. Food, hotel, and personal expenses are blocked unless explicitly overridden.
approvals.purchaseDescription: Fuel, peage, paper copies, duct tape, gloves, screws, connectors, tools, and emergency materials must be tracked and approved.
approvals.allowanceDescription: Auto-calculated as mission days multiplied by each technician's 152, 160, or 175 MAD rate. No receipt required.
approvals.reasonPlaceholder: Reason for rejection or partial approval

cash.title: Cash Control
cash.description: Every payment must pass company cash control and, when linked, project budget control.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Supplier debt, unpaid invoices, due dates, and aging exposure.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: Morocco TVA, CNSS, IR, and IS obligations with due-date alerts.

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.description: Inventory quantity, stock movement history, project links, and low-stock visibility.

fleet.title: Fleet Operations
fleet.description: Vehicle registry, assignment, mileage, fuel tracking, location, GPS-ready fields, and maintenance alerts.

imports.title: Excel Imports
imports.description: Upload old Excel files and import only the fields that match ScadaCom ERP rules. Unknown columns are ignored and invalid rows are skipped with a reason.
imports.projectsHelp: Project name, client, work type, technology, region, site ID, dates, status, contract value, allocated budget, priority, complexity.
imports.employeesHelp: Full name, phone, role, base salary, allowance rate.
imports.vehiclesHelp: Plate, model, project, mileage, fuel usage, Google Maps link, location type, oil change, insurance, inspection.
imports.purchasesHelp: Project, item/product, category, amount, payment method, status, notes.
imports.expensesHelp: Project, category, amount, status, notes, admin override.
imports.rulesHelp: Pending rows do not affect costs. Food/hotel/personal expenses are skipped unless admin override is present.
imports.reading: Reading Excel file and applying ERP rules...

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Profit per project, expenses, purchases, supplier debt, taxes, fleet cost, and cash flow.

auditHistory.title: System Audit History
auditHistory.description: Full movement history for edits, approvals, rejections, uploads, archives, deletes, Boss Room activity, and financial changes.
auditHistory.search: Search user, record, project, file, or action

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: No public registration. Access is admin-created through one-time expiring invite links.

bossRoom.title: Boss Profit Room
bossRoom.description: Confidential Boss-only space. Passcode required even after login.
bossRoom.lockedDescription: This room stays locked even after normal login.
bossRoom.unlocked: Boss room unlocked for this page.

bossIntelligence.title: Boss Intelligence Layer
bossIntelligence.description: A staged view of what is happening, what is wrong, why it is happening, what may happen next, and what action to take.
bossIntelligence.noLinkedRecords: No linked records in the available data.
bossIntelligence.noFilteredResults: No insights match the selected filters.

levelDescriptions.overview: Current state of cash, projects, expenses, fleet, warehouse, and approvals.
levelDescriptions.redFlags: Critical and warning issues ordered by priority.
levelDescriptions.rootCause: Why the problems are happening and which records they connect to.
levelDescriptions.predictions: Likely future risks with confidence and timing.
levelDescriptions.suggestions: Recommended actions with reason and expected impact.
levelDescriptions.roleAssistance: The assistant can suggest, draft, and flag, but the Boss controls decisions.

bossAi.title: SCADACOM Intelligence Assistant
bossAi.description: Ask private questions about company performance, risks, costs, suppliers, taxes, fleet, warehouse, missions, and monthly reports.
bossAi.private: Boss-only assistant. Every question is checked against the boss passcode and audited.
bossAi.welcome: Ask me what needs attention. I will use only the company data available in the database and I will say when data is missing.
bossAi.error: The assistant could not answer right now.
bossAi.ruleBased: AI model is not configured, so this answer used local rule-based database analysis.

prompts.actionPlan: Create action plan for next week

profitSimulator.description: Model revenue, cost, margin, break-even, and recommended pricing before saving a scenario to a project.

monthlyReports.title: Monthly Performance Reports
monthlyReports.description: Generate, compare, lock, and export monthly company performance snapshots.

qa.title: Translation QA
qa.description: Lists app modules that should use translation keys.
